summary: A superb audience tape with crystal‑clear vocal and instrument separation, highlighted by a first set that fans rave about.
review: The recording is praised as one of the best audience tapes available, delivering superb separation and faithful capture of Jerry’s guitar tone, Bob’s vocals and Phil’s bass. Listeners especially love the first set, describing the show as really good and memorable, even though no specific songs are called out. Overall the tape offers an excellent listening experience despite being an audience source.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (4–5) and strong praise for both the performance (first set) and the tape quality lead to a combined rating of about 4.3 out of 5.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with a Sony TC‑D5M, yielding superb separation and clarity; vocals and instruments (Jerry, Bob, Phil) are captured beautifully with minimal muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is highlighted as especially strong; overall the show is described as really good and memorable by multiple reviewers.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar tone and vocals are captured beautifully with clear separation.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass and vocal presence are well reproduced in the audience mix.
band_member_comments.Bob: His vocals stand out clearly, making it easy to pick out his contributions.
